title: Update Meet the Team heading, News section CTA text, and remove gun animation

requirements.summary: Change the 'Meet the Team' section heading to 'Meet With LEGEND' in the Roster section
acceptanceCriteria: The Roster/Meet the Team section heading displays 'Meet With LEGEND' instead of the previous heading text.
The heading styling remains consistent with the esports visual theme.

file_operations.description: Update the section heading text from the current roster heading to 'Meet With LEGEND'. Preserve all existing styling classes and structure.

requirements.summary: Update News section CTA button text to display 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament'
acceptanceCriteria: The News section displays a CTA element with 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament' as the text content.
The two link elements at the specified XPaths are updated to show 'Join Now' and 'For Tournament' respectively.
The styling remains consistent with the esports visual theme.

file_operations.description: Locate the two anchor/button elements in the News section (matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/a[1] and a[2]). Update the first element's text content to 'Join Now' and the second element's text content to 'For Tournament'. Maintain existing styling and layout.

requirements.summary: Remove the gun/shooting canvas animation and all related code from the hero section
acceptanceCriteria: The canvas element for the gun/shooting animation is no longer present in the hero section.
No gun, arm, bullet, shell casing, muzzle flash, or recoil animation renders anywhere on the page.
The hero section layout remains intact and visually coherent after the canvas is removed.
All animation-related JavaScript/canvas code in HeroSection.tsx is cleaned up.

file_operations.description: Remove the entire canvas element and all associated shooting animation logic from HeroSection.tsx. This includes: the canvas element itself (matching XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/canvas[1]), all useEffect/useRef hooks managing the animation, all drawing logic for the arm, gun, bullets, shell casings, muzzle flash, and recoil effects, and any related state or variables. Ensure the hero section layout remains visually coherent and intact after removal.
